## Repo 간 책임 경계

| Repo | 책임 |
| --- | --- |
| `riido-daemon` | customer-PC daemon, CLI/local helper, provider adapters, local IPC, host integration, store distribution executable contract |
| `riido-contracts` | shared task/IR/provider capability/assignment/API contracts |
| `riido-control-plane` | SaaS HTTP/SSE behavior, RBAC/authZ, assignment store/read model, client-facing API |
| `riido-infra` | Terraform, AWS deployment topology, remote state, private release/deploy evidence |

## 작업 규칙

- create a Riido task first and use its returned branchName exactly
- same fact in multiple repos must be promoted to riido-contracts instead of copied
- deployment-only facts belong to riido-infra and server runtime facts belong to riido-control-plane
- retired riido_daemon_private and riido-daemon-private sources must not be read, compared, cherry-picked, pushed, or merged
- provider CLIs are user-installed external tools and must not be bundled into package artifacts
- cmd/riido is local-only and must not open public TCP or HTTP listeners
- new env vars or flags must update config-reference and parser tests in the same PR
- provider adapter behavior changes must update deterministic tests and integration-matrix
- store distribution changes must update the store contract, distribution docs, release docs, and storecontract verification
